title: Mangled docstring on send_profile_broadcast describes is_admin
description: commands.rs lines 946-978: the docstring above send_profile_broadcast() starts with 'True if this client is currently the MLS group admin' and then pivots to describing send_profile_broadcast. The is_admin function at line 981 has no docstring at all. The doc comment on send_profile_broadcast is a copy-paste concatenation of two different function descriptions. A contributor reading the docs will get wrong information about both functions. The correct docstring for is_admin is correct (it does return bool based on online[0]), and the correct docstring for send_profile_broadcast is described below the misplaced admin description.
